name: HMB (beta-hydroxy-beta-methylbutyrate)
summary: A leucine metabolite marketed for muscle gain and anti-catabolism. Early claims were large and have not held up in trained lifters; any benefit is small and mostly limited to untrained or catabolic states.
effect: Little to no meaningful benefit for hypertrophy in resistance-trained people eating adequate protein; possible minor role in untrained beginners or muscle-wasting conditions.
